feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: S_ALR_87012277 Fiori App
entry.content:
Hello,
i need a Fiori to see the balance carried forward "Saldovortrag". Like in G/L Account Balances - S_ALR_87012277.

entry.title: SAP Fiori Inbox parameters configuration
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a configuration step for SAP Fiori Inbox somewhere to achieve the following:

In Launchpad designer we can set parameters like listSize or showAdditionalAttributes. This works fine if users start the Fiori Inbox via FLP and navigate to the Inbox tile.

If users have bookmarks to the Fiori Inbox or if notifications are sent via eMail and contain just the URL sap/bc/ui5_ui5/ui2/ushell/shells/abap/FioriLaunchpad.html#WorkflowTask-displayInbox the parameters are not set and Inbox behaves differently.

So is there a "place" where Inbox parameters can be defined and Inbox uses the defined parameters independently if called via direct Link or via FLP?

Thanks for your input(s).

#Fiori #Inbox #FioriInbox

entry.title: Search filed on a calculated field
entry.content:
Hi,

I built a FIORI report based on I_Supplier CDS.

I put the field SupplierName as a search field.

I get this short dump:

Database returned the SQL code 7. Error text: feature not supported: CONTAINS predicates on expression RTRIM(SUBSTR(RTRIM(REPLACE(RTRIM(CONCAT(RTRIM(LFA1.NAME1), RTRIM(CONCAT(' &@', RTRIM(LFA1.NAME2))))), '&@', '')), 1, 80))

Is there a way (other then using NAME1 and NAME2  separately) to fix the problem?

@AndreFischer

entry.title: Display customer list standard app new column addition
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a requirement in which we need to add a new column (PAN) in the table inside Display Customer List.

I have tried to create a adaptation project on SAP BAS. I was unable to add a new column using the SAPUI5 adaptation editor. 

Fiori App reference library: "Display Customer List application"

https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps(%27F2640%27)/S23OP

Any help is greatly appreciated.

Kind Regards,

Avishek

entry.title: Load SAPUI5 library from Cordova container
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We're currently deploying a Fiori standalone app to the BTP Cloud Foundry with an approuter to enable a static URL for our application. Due to performance issues when running on mobile devices with low bandwidth, we figured we could create a Cordova app that uses its in-app browser to open the web app and load only the SAPUI5 library files from local device storage.

We referenced sap-ui-core.js like so:

 

<script id="sap-ui-bootstrap"
	src="https://localhost/sapui5/sap-ui-core.js"
	data-sap-ui-theme="sap_belize_plus"
	data-sap-ui-resourceroots='{"com.example.app": "./"}'
	data-sap-ui-compatVersion="edge"
	data-sap-ui-oninit="module:sap/ui/core/ComponentSupport"
	data-sap-ui-async="true"
	data-sap-ui-frameOptions="trusted">
</script>

 

Unfortunately, some files are not being loaded due to issues with CORS. Strangely enough, only some files like messagebundle.properties or sap/ui/thirdparty/datajs.js are affected. sap-ui-core.js and most other files are loaded successfully.

What are we missing?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Tutorials for Creating a full stack CAP application using separate layers of UI5, node.js and HANA
entry.content:
Hello,

I am looking for tutorials, where I can build separate modules for Node.Js, UI5 and HANA, and then connect them together to form a fully fledged application, based on a use case from one of the previous projects I was a small part of, so as to upskill myself and apply the knowledge in my future projects. 

However, I could not find any tutorials, for connecting separately created modules to this purpose. 

 

Could anyone please help me with the same, where I can find the relevant resources?

 

Many thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to Make SAP Business Partner Entity Object Page Editable
entry.content:
Hi,

I created a Fiori List Report Page with my CAP project which use the SAP S/4HANA Business Partner (A2X) BusinessPartner Entity, and it connects to our backend service.

I managed to get the data when querying to backend via the provided API GET /A_BusinessPartner, like this screenshot below:

 But when I click one of the line, and go to the Object Page:

There's no edit button.
I get it, it needs the @SAP.updatable field needs to be true for every properties.
Since the generated cds file from the OData edmx file from the website: https://api.sap.com/api/OP_API_BUSINESS_PARTNER_SRV/overview is defaulted to false, how do I make this Object Page editable and able to hit the provided PATCH API?
Is there any way to make the Object Page editable without much workaround or just by using the same entity or tweak the entity?

Do you have any suggestions @gregorw?

Regards,
Andreas

entry.title: Is there any method can upload and post API bank statement to meet Japan local requirement?
entry.content:
I am facing a problem while implementing a project in Japan. To satisfy the customer's requirements, we need to upload the bank statement via an API form and post it. However, it seems that the standard S/4 HANA Cloud does not provide an API form for bank statement uploads.

Can anyone help me or provide instructions on how to handle this?

I would greatly appreciate your assistance.

entry.title: What is the replacement of sap.ca.scfld.md.app in S4/HANA2023?
entry.content:
We have created an Adaptation Project for My Inbox and called a custom SAPUI5 application to display in the details area. We successfully implemented it, however now we wanted to customize the approval part in which we want to save some data to our custom OData service first before sending it to the workflow. In our older version of My Inbox, we were able to do this by using "sap.ca.scfld". See screenshot below:

However in our new version of My Inbox, we are already encountering an error with this library. Therefore we cannot proceed in sending our requests to the Workflow. Would you know how we can fix this? Or is there any implementation guide you can give as a reference? I couldn't find any article related to it yet. Appreciate much if you could help us with this. Thank you very much.

entry.title: unable to use targetElement within ui.facet when extending a standard cds view
entry.content:
Hi, 
I tried to extend the ui.facet of a standard cds view with a new metadata extension. The purpose is to extend the object page of a fiori element app with a new section and present it as table (type: #LINEITEM_REFERENCE). First I extended the standard app with a new association to my ZCDSView which it has also a metadata extension file with annotation (@UI.LINEITEM).
I did also a metadata extension to the standard app on the customer layer and add a new label to the UI.facet as follow:
@ui.facet: [

{

id: 'addr',
label: 'address',
pupose: #standard,
type: #LINEITEM_REFERENCE,
position: 230,
targetElement: '_ZCDSView'                //defined as an alias of the association in the extension of the standard cds

}]

The problem is that The section 'address' is not appearing at all in the object page. But when removing the targetElement: '_ZCDSView',  the label appear with empty content.

I am also sure that the association has been defined properly in the extended view because the association can be followed in the data preview mode.
Any solution to this problem?

entry.title: Field addition in Screen Maintenance Requests app
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I need to add an Equipment Sort Field to Screen Maintenance App.

For this in which view I need to add the field.

Kindly let me know the procedure for to add a field to the app or in which BADI we can add logic.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav.

entry.title: SAPUI5: Wrong Deviation Calculation for KPI/DataPoint
entry.content:
I have an SAPUI5 application that is based on an FIORI Elements Overview Page template.
One of my cards on the OVP shows an KPI header with the following values:

  • KPI Value: Average Delivery Delay (in days) for the past 90 days
  • Target Value: Average Delivery Delay (in days) for the past 365 days
  • Automatically calculated deviation of the values  in %

We recently upgraded our system from S/4 2020 SP3 to S/4 2023 SP1. This included updating SAPUI5 libraries from 1.84.6 to 1.120.0. After the upgrade, the deviation calculation shows a wrong value. Before it worked as expected.

                
<Annotation Term="UI.DataPoint" Qualifier="DataPointDurchschnittLieferverzug">
	<Record Type="UI.DataPointType">
		<PropertyValue Property="Title" String="{@i18n>datapoint_title_durchschnitt_lieferverzug}" />
		<PropertyValue Property="Description" String="{@i18n>datapoint_title_durchschnitt_lieferverzug}" />
		<PropertyValue Property="Value" Path="AvgDelivToCmtdDelivDelayInDays" />
		<PropertyValue Property="CriticalityCalculation">
			<Record Type="UI.CriticalityCalculationType">
				<PropertyValue Property="ImprovementDirection" EnumMember="UI.ImprovementDirectionType/Minimize" />
				<PropertyValue Property="ToleranceRangeHighValue" Decimal="3" />
				<PropertyValue Property="DeviationRangeHighValue" Decimal="5" />
			</Record>
		</PropertyValue>
		<PropertyValue Property="TrendCalculation">
			<Record Type="UI.TrendCalculationType">
				<PropertyValue Property="ReferenceValue" Path="AvgDlvToCmtdDlvDelayPast365Day" />
				<PropertyValue Property="UpDifference" Decimal="1" />
				<PropertyValue Property="StrongUpDifference" Decimal="2" />
				<PropertyValue Property="DownDifference" Decimal="-1" />
				<PropertyValue Property="StrongDownDifference" Decimal="-2" />
			</Record>
		</PropertyValue>
		<PropertyValue Property="ValueFormat">
			<Record Type="UI.NumberFormat">
				<PropertyValue Property="NumberOfFractionalDigits" Int="1" />
			</Record>
		</PropertyValue>
	</Record>
</Annotation>

entry.title: Regarding updating BLOB in BTP Cloud Hana DB via CAPM oData V4
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
We have a requirement to upload a file to the Hana DB Table in BTP Cloud. The table is created via CAP Model entity and the field is LargeBinary and annotated as MediaType (pdf).

Based on the CAP Entity, we have created Service file also and the oData V4 is generated successfully.

Now while trying to upload the file via file Uploader UI, the update is not happening.

As a troubleshoot method, we created a standard Fiori List Report and it worked as expected.

We would like to upload the file in our custom Freestyle application which sometimes ended up in Error 413 (request payload too large). The same oData service works from postman as well.

We also tried in two parts, Creating a record with UUID and then update the file with PUT  method. This also did not work as expected.

Attached the CAP, UI5 code etc.

Any help in this regards is highly appreciated.

Best Regards,

Vivek

entry.title: SAP Fiori My Inbox URL generation for intent-based object navigation
entry.content:
Dear expert, 

I'm working on migrating UWL task list to Fiori My Inbox and referring KBA 2274940 - URL generation for intent-based navigation

I'm launching via SAP Work Zone Fiori Inbox Cloud - default webgui / wda

I'm able to configure Open Task via SWFVISU transaction which open the task in a new tab. However, the link in the Related Object tab fails to open the page. 

Configuration has been setup in SWFVISU for Object Visualization. The link generated upon clicked generated as below. The query parameter P_INSTID is generated with encoded value. I tried remove the encoded value manually and the page was able to load correctly. 

https://workzone.host#QMSMObject-process?P_INSTID=%EF%BB%BF0002000021110001%EF%BB%BF&P_CATID=BO&P_TYPEID=QMSM&P_METHOD=DISPLAY

From the web developer tools network response, the parameter is encoded with "Control character zero width no-break space". 

Debug from backend, the field actually returned correct value without any space. 

 

Checked the SAP Notes KBA 3326460 - Related Object links are not working properly in My Inbox does not have information about this error. 

Any idea is there any configuration that I could missed out?

Regards,

Ben

#MyInbox #Fiori #URLGeneration #ObjectVisualization

entry.title: Unauthorized Error While Fetching Business Partner Details Using SAP Service Layer
entry.content:
I am facing an issue while fetching business partner details from the SAP Service Layer in a SAP Fiori application (developed using VS Code).

Issue Details:

  1. Session ID Retrieval:
    • I am successfully retrieving the session ID by calling the login API from the Service Layer.
  2. Fetching Business Partner Details:
    • For the GET request to fetch business partner details, I am passing the session ID in the headers as follows:

 

 
{ method: "GET", headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json", "B1SESSION": sessionID, // Session ID fetched from login API }, withCredentials: true, }
  1. Errors Encountered:
    • Initially, I faced CORS issues. After adding the necessary fields in the Service Layer headers, the CORS error was resolved.
    • However, I now receive the following errors for the GET request:
      • Unauthorized
      • Invalid session ID
      • Session ID timed out

Troubleshooting:

  • I verified that the session ID is fetched correctly from the login API and passed in the headers.
  • I ensured the application configuration aligns with the Service Layer requirements.

Request for Help:

  1. Are there any additional headers or configurations required for the B1SESSION token?
  2. How can I ensure the session ID does not timeout during the API calls?

entry.title: index.js is not called in index.html in runtime
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I have created the walkthrough project in the BTP.

index.html is not able to call index.js, can you check and tell the mistake.

index.html

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head>
	<meta charset="utf-8">
	<title>UI5 Walkthrough</title>
	<script
		id="sap-ui-bootstrap"
		src="resources/sap-ui-core.js"
		data-sap-ui-theme="sap_horizon"
		data-sap-ui-libs="sap.m"
		data-sap-ui-compat-version="edge"
		data-sap-ui-async="true"
		data-sap-ui-on-init="module:ui5/walkthrough/index"
		data-sap-ui-resource-roots='{
			"ui5.walkthrough": "./"
		}'>

	</script>
</head>
<body>
<div>Hello World</div>
</body>
</html>

index.js

sap.ui.define([], () => {
	"use strict";
	alert("UI5 is ready");
});

Thanks

Kaushik

SAP Portal/SAP UI5/SAP Fiori/Web Dynpro Java

entry.title: SmartFilterBar Date field default value with sign greater than or equal to
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am working on a SmartFilterBar with Date field and trying to populate default value with operation / option like shown in image (Greater than or equal to today's date). I tried few ways but didn't work. Can someone please help by pointing detailed way to achieve this?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Is there any way to restrict access of T-codes involved in FIORI standard catalogs for VA01 for SOD
entry.content:
Is it possible to restrict access to specific transactions within a standard catalog? Currently, we need to limit access to the VA01 transaction code in the standard catalog SAP_SD_BC_SO_PROC_OP, which contains multiple transactions such as VA01, VA02, and VA03.

I attempted to create a new catalog to achieve this, but I couldn't maintain groups in the new catalog. The system is connected to ECC and Fiori.

Could you guide me on whether there is a way to restrict access to only VA01 in ECC or through another approach?

entry.title: Business Application Studio-Fiori Tools - Fiori app generation broken for RAP-based OData V4 service
entry.content:
Hi,

Environment details:

Backend - SAP S4HANA 2022 FPS02

SAP Business Application Studio Version: 1.93.1
UI5 Version 1.108.30

I am encountering a strange issue in SAP Business Application Studio (BAS) while generating a Fiori List Report for a RAP-based OData V4 service. Despite the service being explicitly defined and recognized as OData V4, BAS/Fiori Tools incorrectly treat it as an OData V2 service and generate faulty configurations.

This issue affects all my previously deployed V4 services, which worked successfully earlier. However, when redeploying these services as duplicate apps for testing, BAS incorrectly interprets them as V2 services. As a result, the generated application is broken and fails to function both during preview in BAS and after deployment.

The app fails to load with the following errors:
"[ODataMetadata] initial loading of metadata failed"

"Invalid metadata document."

It is important to note that the same application and service work perfectly fine when previewed locally through Eclipse, which confirms that both the app and the generated OData V4 service, metadata are correct. 

Is anyone else facing a similar problem? App generation and deployment has worked absolutely fine in the past with the exact same steps.

Best Regards,

Saurabh

entry.title: Not able to add more than one data source in sapui5 app in cloud foundry
entry.content:
Dear Team,

I have already developed and deployed a SAPUI5 freestyle application in SAP Cloud Foundry, using the SAP C4C API as the data source. Now, I need to consume some data from an on-premise S/4HANA system. However, when I add a second data source to the existing UI5 MTA application, I encounter a 404 error.

I have referred to community discussions and found that similar issues remain unresolved.

Please assist us in identifying what we are missing in adding the second data source. Attached is the project files for your reference.

Thanks
